creator: kiri@kiri.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
I've made a NEW port about IM(Internet Message) with both
	Emacs and Mule. This is the master port of
	mew-common-1.92(mail/mew-common). 

        I put the port packed with 'tar czf' and uuencode below "Fix:"

	Packed list is

		1855 Nov 27 14:58 im-76.tar.gz

		   0 Nov 26 11:24 1997 im/           
		1078 Nov 26 11:24 1997 im/Makefile   
		   0 Nov 20 15:10 1997 im/files/     
		  54 Nov 13 10:49 1997 im/files/md5  
		   0 Nov 26 11:13 1997 im/pkg/       
		 818 Nov 26 11:13 1997 im/pkg/DESCR  
		  71 Nov 13 11:17 1997 im/pkg/COMMENT
		1517 Nov 20 21:14 1997 im/pkg/PLIST
